confirmed_issues.title: Missing effective_from for clause (b) amendment marker 1
confirmed_issues.problem: Node CGST-R21-b carries amendment marker [1] but has no effective_from. Amendment hint 1 states effective_date '2017-06-22' (w.e.f. 22.06.2017). This is a genuine chronology defect: the clause's effective date is determinable from the hint but missing from the node.
confirmed_issues.recommended_fix: Set effective_from='2017-06-22' on CGST-R21-b to propagate from hint amendment 1.

manual_review_issues.title: Node missing effective_from despite hint providing effective_date
manual_review_issues.problem: CGST-R21-b carries amendment marker [1] which has effective_date '2017-06-22' from the SUBSTITUTED action in hint amendment marker 1. However, the node's effective_from field is null, causing the operative effective date to be lost in extraction.
manual_review_issues.recommended_fix: Set effective_from: '2017-06-22' on CGST-R21-b, derived from the effective_date field in hint amendment marker 1's SUBSTITUTED event.

summary: 1 confirmed issue(s) remain after challenge, arbitration, and GST false-positive filtering.
